sources.evidence: Browser rendered calendar; public API calendar/get-items?period=future returned entries:[] (last activity Sept 2025 — calendar dormant). Genuine empty state.

Rendered NYC discover place feed via public discover/get-paginated-events (discplace-Izx1rQVSh8njYpP), 60 events; 3 AI events in window, 0 crypto. Crypto-specific Luma search is auth-gated (401), so crypto richness reduced this run.
HTTP 403 Cloudflare 'Just a moment...' managed-challenge on all paths. No proxy/render available (Bright Data & Apify MCP not configured; browser allowlist excludes domain).
Rendered listings, but all results were generic investing/networking events (Girl Math, NY Traders Happy Hour, networking nights) — none crypto/web3/blockchain-themed; excluded per scope rule.
Server-rendered page shows 'No upcoming events' — valid empty state.
Invite-gated; no public NYC crypto discovery surface. Skipped per best-effort policy.
Alumni portal requires login; not reachable unauthenticated. NY Bocconi event captured instead via Friends of Bocconi USA cross-listing.
FullCalendar admin-ajax is nonce-gated (400); bypassed via plugin public ICS feed (?feed=eo-events, HTTP 200, 67 VEVENTs). 1 event in window (Claudia Parzani evening, 2026-06-15, NYC).
Server-rendered list. 4 NYC in-person events in window; Zoom webinars and non-NYC (St. Louis) events excluded.
Page shows 'Stay tuned for more events in 2026!' — valid empty state.

Slate SPA: served HTML is a JS shell; events injected client-side via JS session token. No static iCal/feed (cmd=ical 405, .ics 404). No render path (Bright Data/Apify unconfigured, browser domain-blocked, WebFetch no-JS). Prior-run Stern entries remain in events.json and age by date — not re-confirmed this run.
Server-rendered enough for extraction; every near-term event matched prior-run register-link data exactly. 2 NYC in-person (Jul 7/8) + 1 NYC (Aug 10) + 9 online sessions in 90-day window.
Server-rendered; SFMBA virtual info sessions (Jun 23, Jul 22). Cambridge in-person visits excluded (non-NYC). No NYC in-person sessions.
Server-rendered; 7 online MBA admissions webinars in 90-day window. In-person sessions are Paris/Fontainebleau/Singapore/Sydney (non-NYC, excluded). No NYC in-person.
Server-rendered partial: only non-NYC event visible (Alumni Panel in Manila, Jun 29). No Full-Time/One-Year MBA NYC in-person events in window. Evening/Weekend & Executive MBA excluded per rule.
